case_title: ALEXENE SHORE VS. AGELESS BEAUTY CORP. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHORE, ALEXENE AS TO DEFENDANT AGELESS BEAUTY CORP. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA AGELESS BEAUTY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHORE, ALEXENE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AGELESS BEAUTY CORP. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA AGELESS BEAUTY $4,095.00 PRINCIPAL, $205.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,300.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
